name: studysphere
description: StudySphere student productivity hub with mobile and desktop packaging.

scripts.desktop:dev: npm run prepare:desktop && npm run desktop:icon && electron .
scripts.windows:installer: set ELECTRON_CACHE=.electron-cache&& set ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.electron-builder-cache&& npm run prepare:desktop && npm run desktop:icon && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.android:sync: npm run prepare:mobile && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:aab: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.ios:add: npm run prepare:mobile && cap add ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run prepare:mobile && cap sync ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run ios:sync && cap open ios
